name: fused SwiGLU FFN
preconditions: x, w_gate, w_up, w_down are contiguous

numerics.notes: Projections are torch.matmul; the fused part is the SwiGLU activation, accumulated in fp32 (reduce_dtype=fp32). Reference and Triton kernel share ONE activation precision path (manual g*sigmoid(g) in fp32) -> bit-identical activation, so only the projections (identical torch matmuls) differ; this fixed the bf16/fp16 rel~2.5 divergence (issue #82). fp32 rtol is 1e-4 (not 1e-5): the down-projection (K=N, mixed-sign h) has catastrophic cancellation that amplifies the unavoidable torch.sigmoid-vs-tl.sigmoid fp32-ULP activation difference to ~2.6e-5 at moderate-magnitude outputs; 1e-5 is below that floor.
